svg.title: SmartScale pipeline architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end flow: Prometheus scrapes RPS, LSTM predicts future RPS, a neural net maps that to required replicas, a custom exporter surfaces the metric, and KEDA drives Kubernetes autoscaling.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SmartScale scrape metrics from Prometheus?')
sendPrompt('How does the LSTM model predict future RPS in SmartScale?')
sendPrompt('What training data does the LSTM use?')
sendPrompt('What artifacts does the LSTM training produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the neural network map RPS to replica count in SmartScale?')
sendPrompt('How does the Prometheus exporter work in SmartScale?')
sendPrompt('How does KEDA read the Prometheus metric and trigger autoscaling in SmartScale?')
sendPrompt('How does Kubernetes apply the replica count from KEDA in SmartScale?')
